Package de.uka.ilkd.key.rule

Interface Rule

All Superinterfaces:
HasOrigin, Named, Rule
All Known Subinterfaces:
BuiltInRule, ExternalSolverRule
All Known Implementing Classes:
AbstractAuxiliaryContractRule, AbstractBlockContractRule, AbstractLoopContractRule, AbstractLoopInvariantRule, AbstractSideProofRule, AntecTaclet, BlockContractExternalRule, BlockContractInternalRule, CloseAfterMerge, FindTaclet, InfFlowBlockContractInternalRule, InfFlowContractAppTaclet, InfFlowLoopContractInternalRule, InfFlowUseOperationContractRule, InfFlowWhileInvariantRule, IsabelleRule, JmlAssertRule, LoopApplyHeadRule, LoopContractExternalRule, LoopContractInternalRule, LoopScopeInvariantRule, MergeRule, ModalitySideProofRule, NoFindTaclet, ObserverToUpdateRule, OneStepSimplifier, QueryExpand, QuerySideProofRule, RewriteTaclet, SetStatementRule, SMTRule, SuccTaclet, Taclet, UseDependencyContractRule, UseOperationContractRule, WdBlockContractInternalRule, WdWhileInvariantRule, WhileInvariantRule
public interface Rule extends Rule, HasOrigin
This interface has to be implemented by all classes that want to act as a rule in the calculus.
